name: Conference Registration System (v2)
description: Extended conference system adding an email notification service for registration confirmations and reminders. Demonstrates calm diff changes relative to v1 — one new node and one new relationship added.

nodes.name: Attendee Portal
nodes.description: Browser-based web application through which conference attendees browse sessions, register, and manage their bookings.

nodes.name: Registration Service
nodes.description: Backend service that handles conference registration requests, validates attendee details, persists registration records, and triggers email notifications on successful registration.

nodes.name: Registration Database
nodes.description: Relational database storing conference registration records, attendee profiles, and session bookings.

nodes.name: Email Notification Service
nodes.description: Service that sends transactional emails to conference attendees — registration confirmations, schedule reminders, and cancellation notices.

relationships.description: Attendee Portal calls the Registration Service REST API to submit and retrieve registrations
Registration Service reads and writes attendee registration records to the Registration Database
Registration Service triggers email notifications via the Email Notification Service on successful registration
